name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvAddrExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.ASDF_TMP_EdwDmProvDirDmProvAddrExtr;WITH cte_ip1 AS (SELECT DISTINCT ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_GEO_ACES_RTRN_CD_TX, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_HCAP_IN, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_PDX_24_HR_IN, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LN_1, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LN_2, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LN_3, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_CITY_NM, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ST_CD, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ST_NM, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_CNTY_NM, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_D PROV_D, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_NTWK_D B, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.NTWK_D NTWK_D, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_ADDR_D ADDR WHERE PROV_D.PROV_ID = B.PROV_ID AND PROV_D.PROV_ADDR_ID = ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID AND B.NTWK_SK = NTWK_D.NTWK_SK AND B.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND NTWK_D.NTWK_DIR_CD IN ('ALLDIR','WEBDIR') AND B.PROV_NTWK_DIR_IN = 'Y' AND ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND PROV_D.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND ADDR.PROV_ADDR_PRCTC_LOC_IN = 'Y' AND (ADDR.PROV_ADDR_CNTY_CLS_CD = 'CONTG' OR ADDR.PROV_ADDR_CNTY_CLS_CD = '32CNTY') AND B.PROV_NTWK_EFF_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.BatchDate}' AND B.PROV_NTWK_TERM_DT_SK > '@{pipeline().parameters.BatchDate}' AND PROV_D.PROV_TERM_DT_SK > '@{pipeline().parameters.BatchDate}' AND ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK > '@{pipeline().parameters.BatchDate}' AND ADDR.PROV_ADDR_SK NOT IN (0,1)), cte_ip2 AS (SELECT DISTINCT ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_GEO_ACES_RTRN_CD_TX, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_HCAP_IN, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_PDX_24_HR_IN, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LN_1, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LN_2, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LN_3, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_CITY_NM, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ST_CD, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ST_NM, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_CNTY_NM, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX, ADDR.PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_D PROV_D, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PDX_NTWK_D B, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_ADDR_D ADDR WHERE B.PROV_SK = PROV_D.PROV_SK AND PROV_D.PROV_ADDR_ID = ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID AND B.SRC_SYS_CD = 'NABP' AND B.PDX_NTWK_CD IN ('ESI0021','ESI9031') AND B.PDX_NTWK_TERM_DT_SK = '9999-12-31' AND B.PDX_NTWK_DIR_IN = 'Y' AND ADDR.PROV_ADDR_SK NOT IN (0,1)), cte_funnel AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ADDR_ID, PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD, PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, PROV_ADDR_GEO_ACES_RTRN_CD_TX, PROV_ADDR_HCAP_IN, PROV_ADDR_PDX_24_HR_IN, PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK, PROV_ADDR_LN_1, PROV_ADDR_LN_2, PROV_ADDR_LN_3, PROV_ADDR_CITY_NM, PROV_ADDR_ST_CD, PROV_ADDR_ST_NM, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, PROV_ADDR_CNTY_NM, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX, PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX FROM cte_ip1 UNION ALL SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ADDR_ID, PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD, PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, PROV_ADDR_GEO_ACES_RTRN_CD_TX, PROV_ADDR_HCAP_IN, PROV_ADDR_PDX_24_HR_IN, PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK, PROV_ADDR_LN_1, PROV_ADDR_LN_2, PROV_ADDR_LN_3, PROV_ADDR_CITY_NM, PROV_ADDR_ST_CD, PROV_ADDR_ST_NM, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, PROV_ADDR_CNTY_NM, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX, PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX FROM cte_ip2), cte_transform AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ADDR_ID, PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD, PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK, PROV_ADDR_HCAP_IN, CASE WHEN SRC_SYS_CD <> 'NABP' THEN ' ' ELSE PROV_ADDR_PDX_24_HR_IN END AS PROV_ADDR_PDX_24_HR_IN, PROV_ADDR_LN_1, PROV_ADDR_LN_2, PROV_ADDR_LN_3, PROV_ADDR_CITY_NM, PROV_ADDR_ST_CD, PROV_ADDR_ST_NM, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, PROV_ADDR_CNTY_NM, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, CASE WHEN PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX IS NULL OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX)))=0 THEN 0 ELSE PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX END AS PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX, CASE WHEN PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX IS NULL OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX)))=0 THEN 0 ELSE PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX END AS PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX, PROV_ADDR_GEO_ACES_RTRN_CD_TX, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK)) IN ('UNK','NA','') THEN '1753-01-01' ELSE PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK END AS XX_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK)) IN ('UNK','NA','') THEN '1753-01-01' ELSE PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT_SK END AS XX_PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT, '@{pipeline().parameters.BatchDate}' AS XX_LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte_funnel) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ADDR_ID, PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD, CAST(XX_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT AS DATETIME) AS PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT, CAST(XX_PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT AS DATETIME) AS PROV_ADDR_TERM_DT, PROV_ADDR_HCAP_IN, PROV_ADDR_PDX_24_HR_IN, PROV_ADDR_LN_1, PROV_ADDR_LN_2, PROV_ADDR_LN_3, PROV_ADDR_CITY_NM, PROV_ADDR_ST_CD, PROV_ADDR_ST_NM, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, PROV_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, PROV_ADDR_CNTY_NM, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO, PROV_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO, PROV_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, PROV_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, PROV_ADDR_LAT_TX, PROV_ADDR_LONG_TX, CAST(XX_LAST_UPDT_DT AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT, PROV_ADDR_GEO_ACES_RTRN_CD_TX INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.ASDF_TMP_EdwDmProvDirDmProvAddrExtr FROM cte_transform

Description:
Â© Copyright 2009 Blue Cross/Blue Shield of Kansas City

CALLED BY:  EdwDMProvDirSeq

PROCESSING:   Retrieves the data from EDW PROV_ADDR_D & PROV_NTWK_D table and loads into the Web Provider Directory database

Annotations:
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Read from source table PROV_D,PROV_ADDR_D from EDW. Apply Run Cycle filters to get just the needed rows forward
Job Name: EdwProvDirDmProvAddrExtr
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Read from source table PROV_D,PROV_ADDR_D from EDW. Apply Run Cycle filters to get just the needed rows forward
Write PROV_DIR_DM_PROV_ADDR Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvDirDmProvAddrLoad.
